title: How to Make a 1M DTT Stock Solution
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ci4ugv

steps.title: Weigh 1
steps.instruction: Weigh 1.54 g of Dithiothreitol (DTT) undetermined 00:03:00 DTT P212121 Catalog #SV-DTT

steps.title: Add 10 ml of sterile dH2O
steps.instruction: Add 10 ml of sterile dH2O. Dissolve completely. 00:02:00

steps.title: Prewet a 0
steps.instruction: Prewet a 0.2 µm syringe filter by drawing through 5-10 ml of sterile H2O and discard water. 00:02:00 Syringe Filter P212121 Catalog #LI-PES-0/22-13-S

steps.title: Sterilize DTT Stock through the prepared 0
steps.instruction: Sterilize DTT Stock through the prepared 0.2 µm syringe filter. Aliquot into 2 ml tubes and store at -20°C. Stocks may be kept for 1 year. 00:02:00 DTT P212121 Catalog #SV-DTT
